title: Multifactor Strategy E2E Statistical Admission Framework
goal_statement: Complete the local/static multifactor strategy E2E framework by adding statistical admission gates before implementing or claiming production readiness.
scope_summary: Complete the local/static multifactor strategy E2E framework by adding statistical admission gates for FDR / multiple testing, robust factor statistics, walk-forward / OOS validation, PBO / DSR, and explicit non-authorization boundaries.
CR151 starts at CP0 / CP2 and does not authorize real lake/NAS/provider/QMT/runtime/simulation/live/trading/broker/credential/external framework operations.

Wave A should focus on admission gate hard prerequisites; Wave B candidates can be confirmed at CP3 or routed to CR154, including capacity/impact, benchmark-relative reporting, PIT audit, MF-GAP-2 extended evaluation diagnostics, MF-GAP-4 regime-aware validation and MF-GAP-7 factor clustering/de-dup.
approval_focus: CP8 release readiness must decide whether CR151 PASS_WITH_RISK residual process evidence risks are acceptable for local/static/fixture release readiness.
approve_effect: CP5 approval allows local/static/fixture implementation and tests only; real runtime/data/trading operations remain unauthorized.
reject_effect: N/A after CP2 approval; future rejection at CP3 routes CR151 back to solution-design or requirement-clarification by user decision.
decision_burden: CR151 CP8 approved READY_WITH_RISK; STATE v2 hygiene accepted as process caveat and remains follow-up.
remaining_risks: static/fixture validation may require CP8 risk wording if later presented as release-ready
Wave B items may need CR154 if they grow beyond admission gate scope
split_rationale: CR151 is separated from CR150 because CR150 completed metadata linkage, while CR151 adds statistical admission semantics. It is separated from CR152/CR153 because ML and event-driven strategy frameworks depend on the shared admission/statistical gate foundation.
why_not_merge_with_parent: The roadmap is a planning artifact; CR151 needs a formal CP2 scope baseline before design and implementation.
why_not_story_or_task: The change affects strategy framework scope, admission semantics, tests, evidence and release gates, so it requires formal CR and checkpoint flow.
user_goal_impact: Improves trustworthiness of multifactor research output before returning to data lake production closure or runtime/paper/live work.
